bio.Recent_Position: Benefits Communications and Fair Coordination Intern at VMware in Palo Alto, CA
bio.Involvements: HRMA at UCI, AMP (2018-2020), International Student Ambassador (2019)
bio.Bios: Hello hello! My name is Jocelyn and I initiated in the fall quarter of my freshman year. In my free time I enjoy watching (and re-watching) cooking and dance videos, doing Blogilates, and exploring new views and eats. Fun fact... I used to have a pink streak in my hair. Ask me why leggings are superior to jeans and my travel bucketlist at recruitment, looking forward to meeting you!
